perturbation.original_text: The Fee shall be payable to Charity Tunes in two equal installments of $58,802.80 (plus applicable taxes) due to Charity Tunes on October 1, 2009 and November 1, 2009, respectively payable upon receipt of invoice.
perturbation.changed_text: The Fee shall be payable to Charity Tunes in two equal installments of $58,802.80 (plus applicable taxes). The first installment is due to Charity Tunes on October 1, 2009 payable upon receipt of invoice. The second installment is due December 1, 2009.
perturbation.explanation: The change modifies the due date of the second installment from November 1, 2009 to December 1, 2009 creating an in-text contradiction. This impacts the enforcement of payment terms, as it's now unclear which date is the correct deadline.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 10.FEE: Upon execution of this Agreement by both parties, Charity Tunes will invoice Sponsor for 435,960 unique codes consisting of a maximum of 277,760 Pin Codes containing three (3) music downloads per Pin Code ; (ii) 130,300 Pin Codes containing five (5) music downloads per Pin Code; and (iii) 27,900 Pin Codes containing seven (7) music downloads per Pin Code, for a total cost of $117,605.60 CDN (plus applicable taxes) (collectively the "Fee"), which Fee is calculated at the rate of $0.07 CND (plus applicable taxes) per potential download. The Fee shall be payable to Charity Tunes in two equal installments of $58,802.80 (plus applicable taxes). The first installment is due to Charity Tunes on October 1, 2009 payable upon receipt of invoice. The second installment is due December 1, 2009. In consideration of the fees paid by Sponsor as set out herein, Charity Tunes agrees that during the period beginning October 1, 2009 and ending March 31, 2010, Charity Tunes shall not enable another program sponsorship for all competitive products/product categories distributed/sold within the total Canadian consumer/retail/wholesale market place, inclusive of: - Total Frozen Handhelds - Total Corporation General Mills Handhelds - Total Pizza Pops Handhelds / total Pillsbury Mini Pizzas - Total Corporation McCain Foods Handhelds - Total Pizza Pockets / total McCain Mini Pizzas - Total Corporation Heinz Handhelds - Total Heinz Hot bites (Bagel Bites and Taco Bites) / total Anchor Poppers - Total Corporation Schneider Foods Handhelds - Total Hot Stuffs / total Lean Stuffs - Total Resers Burritos - Total Corp les Plats du Chef Handhelds - Total Hinsdale Farms Corndogs
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the due date of the second installment from November 1, 2009 to December 1, 2009, while the contradicted text reflects this change. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding which date is the correct deadline for the second installment. Since different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, this is classified as 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'. This contradicts the original agreement and creates uncertainty about the obligations and rights of each party.

perturbation.original_text: Eligible Pin Codes may be entered on the www.charitytunes.com website and corresponding music downloaded from October 1, 2009 to March 31, 2010. Pin Codes entered for redemption after 11:59:59 pm PT on March 31, 2010 may be rejected as ineligible. The contents of this section are to be reflected in the Sponsor's rules for the Promotion.
perturbation.changed_text: Eligible Pin Codes may be entered on the www.charitytunes.com website and corresponding music downloaded from October 1, 2009 to March 31, 2010. Pin Codes entered for redemption after 11:59:59 pm PT on April 30, 2010 may be rejected as ineligible. The contents of this section are to be reflected in the Sponsor's rules for the Promotion.
perturbation.explanation: The perturbation modifies the Pin Code redemption deadline. The original text states the deadline as March 31, 2010, while the changed text extends it to April 30, 2010, creating an in-text contradiction within section 7. This would lead to confusion and disputes over the validity of redemptions in April.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 7.PROMOTION PERIOD: Designated Sponsor Products with Pin Codes may be distributed from approximately October 1, 2009 to approximately December 31, 2009 (the "Promotion Period"). Eligible Pin Codes may be entered on the www.charitytunes.com website and corresponding music downloaded from October 1, 2009 to March 31, 2010. Pin Codes entered for redemption after 11:59:59 pm PT on April 30, 2010 may be rejected as ineligible. The contents of this section are to be reflected in the Sponsor's rules for the Promotion.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the Pin Code redemption deadline from March 31, 2010, to April 30, 2010. The contradicted text includes the original deadline and the updated deadline in the same section, leading to an in-text contradiction within section 7 itself. The inclusion of both deadlines creates confusion and ambiguity regarding the valid redemption period, directly contradicting the purpose of having a defined deadline and falling under the Inconsistencies definition of in-text contradiction.
